questions: What is the right to privacy?
answers: Privacy is the right to control your personal information and decide who can access it, when, and how. It applies to both physical and digital spaces.
Privacy holo nijjer personal information er upor control rakhte para — ke dekhbe, kobe dekhbe, ar kivabe use korbe seta decide kora.
Privacy is important because it protects your autonomy, personal safety, and freedom. Without privacy, people can be manipulated, surveilled, or exploited.
Protect your online privacy by reviewing app permissions, using encrypted messaging, limiting what you share on social media, and reading privacy policies before signing up.
